name: For the New World
acquisitionSource: Clear Multiverse Link: Forgotten Seed of Love
descriptionTemplate: Gain [Arg1] Shield. Draw 2 "Skill" cards and grant them {Perception Warp}. Saya: gains 1 stack of {Gynoecium}.
lore:
Bloom, bloom, dyeing the entire world in colors of joy.
That is an ancient healing, an eternal bliss—Saya's final gift to the new world about to be unveiled.
